2322140.name: Cosmic Dungeon
2322140.description: In this 2D pixel-art rogue-like game set in space, players will encounter a variety of bosses, robots, and extraterrestrial creatures on their journey through different planets and dungeons. Players can use various items to enhance their attack abilities and progress further through the levels. These items can be obtained through exploration or purchased with collected Gems at the in-game shop. With its retro-inspired graphics and challenging gameplay, this space-themed rogue-like game is sure to keep players engaged.
2322140.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
